author: Tester <t@t.com>
body:
# Findings

Added `Commands::Assign { id, name }` to clap enum and `run_assign`
helper mirroring `run_set_status` / `run_unblock` shape. Empty
`name` (post-trim) clears the assignee (calls
`Storage::set_assignee(id, None)`); a non-empty trimmed name sets
it. Plain-text output: `assigned <id> to <name>` / `unassigned
<id>`. JSON envelope: `{"ok":true,"id":...,"assignee":<name|null>}`.

Newline-bearing names surface storage's `Error::Invalid` →
`invalid_input` (exit 1) unchanged — no CLI-layer pre-validation
needed; the existing storage guard from `qa-trailer-injection`
(`a902492`) catches it.

# Recommendation

Ship. Pure sugar over an existing storage path; no spec bump
needed. Acceptance criteria all green.

# Confidence

High. 7 new integration tests cover happy path (set), clear with
empty name, JSON envelope on both arms, nonexistent id, newline
guard, and `--help`. Smoke verify against this ticket round-tripped
cleanly (`alice` → `null`).

# Open follow-ups

None for this verb. Out-of-scope items (implicit current-user
assign, multi-assignee, bulk assign by filter) remain on the
backlog as discussed in the ticket spec.

Files changed: `crates/jjf/src/main.rs`, `crates/jjf/tests/assign.rs`
(new), `docs/cli-json.md`, `CLAUDE.md`. Test count: 595 → 602.
